bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has posted a new recruitment notice. Interested candidates are encouraged to review the details and apply.

bracu_official.title: LLB Final Exam Schedule: Spring 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final examination schedule for the LLB program for Spring 2026 has been announced. Students should consult the official notice for specific dates and times.

bracu_official.title: Class Schedule for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: The class schedule for the upcoming Summer 2026 semester is now available. Students are advised to check their course timings and locations.

bracu_official.title: First Year Advising Team (FYAT),Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: Information regarding the First Year Advising Team for Summer 2026 has been released. New students can contact FYAT for academic guidance and support.

bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: The deadline for tuition payment for the Summer 2026 semester is June 27. All students are required to complete their payments by this date.

bracu_official.title: Ashura (Muharram)*-University closed
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will be closed on June 26 in observance of Ashura (Muharram). No academic or administrative activities will take place.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University organizes session on "Classroom to Career: Goal Setting for a Successful Academic & Professional Life"
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University recently held a session focused on transitioning from academic studies to a professional career. The event provided students with strategies for effective goal setting.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University conducts synergy in action workshop to strengthen workplace effectiveness
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University organized a 'Synergy in Action' workshop aimed at enhancing workplace effectiveness. The program fostered improved collaboration and productivity among participants.

bracu_official.title: Head of BRAC University's internal audit gets 2026 ACIIA award in Singapore
bracu_official.summary: The head of BRAC University's internal audit department was awarded the prestigious 2026 ACIIA award in Singapore. This recognition highlights their outstanding contributions to internal auditing.
